title: HighTide's Additions

body:
# HighTide's Additions
### What is it?
HighTide's Additions is a mod for Minecraft that adds a bunch of things to the base game while keeping the look and feel of the vanilla game. This mod will add things that are useful, silly, and useless all while keeping a friendly atmosphere in your Minecraft world. 

 

### What Is In It?
HighTide's Additions is a mod that adds a lot of things. Right now (as of writing this description) there are 9 blocks, 8 items, 1 command, 1 tool, and so much more! This mod is being worked on almost daily and is going to be worked on for a long time. All of the texture resources used in this mod have been made by me and added by me. Below you can find a few of these resources:

![Reinforced Diamond Pickaxe](https://hightide.coolpage.biz/projects/minecraft/java/mods/ht_additions/curseforge/images/items/reinforced_diamond_pickaxe.png)\
![Ruby Sword](https://hightide.coolpage.biz/projects/minecraft/java/mods/ht_additions/curseforge/images/items/ruby_sword.png)\
![Ruby](https://hightide.coolpage.biz/projects/minecraft/java/mods/ht_additions/curseforge/images/items/ruby.png)

There are some of the textures.
